fields.description:
## Why
The agent landing contract only works if agents adopt it: the old "watch the 2 votes" model is now broken (two green votes no longer means "it will land" — a conflict blocks it while votes stay green). Docs must teach the new contract or the conflict case silently reintroduces babysitting.

## What
Rewrite this repo's landing section in `CLAUDE.md` + `CONTRIBUTING.md` to the new contract, and record the design in `docs/adr/0042-*.md`.

## Dependencies
Depends on **S1** (the `Autosubmit` label) and **S4** (the `land` command): the docs must not merge to `main` until the label and command they instruct agents to use are actually live — otherwise the guide points at tooling that does not yet exist.

## Scope
Docs + ADR only.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` + `CONTRIBUTING.md` landing section rewritten: "set `Autosubmit` / run `land`; act on the single typed outcome; do NOT watch votes or treat two green votes as 'it will land'."
- [ ] **Grep the whole repo** for the deprecated "two green votes" / "watch votes" pattern (e.g. in `docs/your-first-change.md`) and update **ALL** occurrences to the new contract — not only `CLAUDE.md`/`CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] `docs/adr/0042-*.md` records the auto-lander, the agent contract + outcome enum, the staged serial→batch plan, and the separation-of-concerns boundary (project infra, not `rebar` core; provider-seam deferred to idea `1701-8bc1-e3b7-4984` — **confirm this id resolves in the store** and anchor ADR-0042 to it).
- [ ] Docs cross-reference ADR-0040 (FFO) + ADR-0041 (LLM-Review `TRIVIAL_REBASE` carry) as the gate substrate the lander sits on.
